title: San Millán Z4 Threshold Day
description: Zone 4 day — 15-20 min efforts at lactate threshold
purpose: Glycolytic system training — improve lactate production and clearance
researcher: Iñigo San Millán / UAE Team Emirates

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. 15:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 15:00 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. 15:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 100% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 8:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 8:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 45% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 28 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 33 minutes in. 102% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 45% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 45% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 102%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45 minutes of work done. 20 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 8:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 105% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 100-105% FTP, 75-85 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 10:00 at 105%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 105% × 10:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
